trade.summary: Trade has been severely disrupted by Turkey's suspension of all trade with Israel in May 2024, citing the Gaza humanitarian crisis. Prior to the suspension, bilateral trade was substantial at around $7 billion annually. Trade through third-country intermediaries likely continues at a reduced level. Turkey had been one of Israel's top trade partners.
disputes: Turkey suspended all trade with Israel May 2024

diplomatic.summary: Turkey-Israel relations have undergone dramatic cycles. After normalizing in 2022 following a decade of strain (stemming from the 2010 Mavi Marmara flotilla incident), President Erdogan became increasingly hostile after October 2023. Turkey recalled its ambassador, called Netanyahu a 'war criminal', compared Israeli actions to Nazi Germany, and suspended trade in May 2024. Turkey filed cases against Israeli leaders at the ICC. Relations are at their lowest point in decades.
recent_incidents: Turkey suspended trade with Israel May 2024
Turkey filed ICC case against Israeli leaders 2024
Erdogan called Netanyahu a war criminal

military.summary: Formerly significant military partnership — Israel supplied UAVs and defense systems to Turkey, and both were NATO-adjacent partners. All defense cooperation has been suspended. Turkey has actively supported Hamas politically and provided political sanctuary. Turkey's membership in NATO creates friction as it acts adversarially toward an informal US ally.
incidents: Turkey providing political support to Hamas leadership

financial.summary: Financial ties have been substantially disrupted by the trade suspension. Bilateral investment remains through existing structures but new investment is frozen. Turkish-Israeli business community relationships have been strained.

energy.summary: Turkey was discussed as a potential transit route for Eastern Mediterranean gas to Europe, a project that would have required Turkey-Israel cooperation. These plans are on hold given the diplomatic rupture. Some energy commodity trade may continue through indirect channels.

scientific.summary: Scientific cooperation has been significantly reduced. Turkish universities have suspended or reduced exchange programs with Israeli institutions. Political environment discourages academic collaboration.
